2603.16325.title: A Human-Centred Architecture for Large Language Models-Cognitive Assistants in Manufacturing within Quality Management Systems
2603.16325.paper_summary: Large Language Models-Cognitive Assistants (LLM-CAs) can enhance Quality Management Systems (QMS) in manufacturing, fostering continuous process improvement and knowledge management. However, there is no human-centred software architecture focused on QMS that enables the integration of LLM-CAs into manufacturing in the current literature. This study addresses this gap by designing a component-based architecture considering requirement analysis and software development process. Validation was conducted via iterative expert focus groups. The proposed architecture ensures flexibility, scalability, modularity, and work augmentation within QMS. Moreover, it paves the way for its operationalization with industrial partners, showcasing its potential for advancing manufacturing processes.
2603.16325.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型-認知助手（LLM-CAs）可以提升製造業的品質管理系統（QMS），促進持續的流程改進和知識管理。<lb/>然而，目前文獻中並沒有以人為中心的軟體架構專注於QMS，能夠將LLM-CAs整合進製造業。<lb/>本研究通過設計一種基於組件的架構，考慮需求分析和軟體開發過程，來填補這一空白。<lb/>驗證是通過反覆的專家焦點小組進行的。<lb/>所提出的架構確保了在QMS內的靈活性、可擴展性、模組化和工作增強。<lb/>此外，它為與工業夥伴的運作鋪平了道路，展示了其推進製造流程的潛力。
2603.16325.author: Marcos Galdino et.al.
2603.16325.authors: Marcos Galdino, Johanna Grahl, Tobias Hamann, Anas Abdelrazeq, Ingrid Isenhardt
